positive: Intricate neo-mystic bioluminescent forest scene. Focus on stylized, oversized botanical elements—giant ferns, glowing flora, and exotic mushrooms—intertwined with celestial elements like crescent moons and swirling nebula patterns. Composition must be centrally focused, designed as a repeating, seamless, and highly detailed ornamental print. Use a high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, forest emerald, and vibrant gold luminescence. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau illustration and psychedelic cosmic geometry, featuring sharp outlines, clean silhouettes, and dramatic volumetric lighting. The overall mood is enchanting, magical, and serene. High detail, vector quality illustration, designed for apparel print, maximum contrast.
negative: blur, artifact, noise, low resolution, text, words, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, deformed, multiple limbs, extra limbs, cropped, messy, abstract (too abstract), photorealism, grayscale, flat colors
